sources.label: Yahoo Finance quote/news page for 003021.SZ (no fresh headlines since Jun 6)
Baker McKenzie - Zhaowei A+H dual listing in Hong Kong (HKD 1.9B, March 2026; already known/priced)
NBD (Apr 9, 2026): RMB 800M dexterous-hand capacity expansion, 2026 commercialization push (pre-window context)
STCN: Zhaowei HK listing, dexterous-hand leader globalization (background)

verdicts.rankRationale: No material news since Jun 6 and the -1.0% day move is noise; yesterday's hold stands. The -12.5% YTD drawdown with the dexterous-hand commercialization thesis intact (RMB 800M capacity add, ZWHAND B20 shipping cadence) keeps the asymmetry slightly improving, worth +1 drift but not a rank change on this page.
verdicts.bull: Sub-$4B cap pure-play on micro-drive actuation and dexterous hands, with fresh HK dual-listing capital and an RMB 800M capacity expansion ahead of 2026 humanoid hand commercialization; the YTD de-rating restores entry asymmetry the Japanese reducer leaders lack.
verdicts.neutral: All known catalysts (A+H listing, CES B20 launch, capacity plan) predate June and are arguably priced; the stock is drifting with the A-share humanoid complex while awaiting order/volume proof points.
verdicts.bear: Dexterous-hand revenue is still small versus legacy micro-drive business; if humanoid OEM order timelines slip (Goldman-flagged supply-chain optimism), the hand premium embedded in the multiple compresses further despite the YTD pullback.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Disclosed dexterous-hand volume orders or named humanoid OEM design wins as 2026 commercialization milestones land (H1 results / interim updates).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Humanoid order push-outs or dexterous-hand competition (Tesla in-house, domestic rivals) eroding ASPs before volumes arrive, leaving a crowded-theme de-rating to continue.
